tasks.label: Build LaTeX
tasks.command: pdflatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.tex; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; bibtex ${fileBasenameNoExtension}; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pdflatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.tex; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; pdflatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode ${fileBasenameNoExtension}.tex; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
